No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
DEFENDANTS RON HENDRIXSON & JC PENNY CORPORATION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Court Proceedings is continued to July 3, 2013 at 3:00 p.m. per agreement of the parties. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Off Calendar May-31-2013 Continued To Jun-26-13 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael J. Burns, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw, Tel. 415.397.2823, for defendant and moving party;
Kit L. Knudsen, Esq. of Commins & Knudsen, Tel. 415.391.6490, for plaintiff and opposing party.

Judge Miller discloses that she is a member of the same Inn of Court as defense counsel Ari Hersher. This will not affect Judge Miller's ability to be fair and impartial in this case. Court gave counsel the opportunity to ask questions. No questions were asked or objections were raised.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, DEFENDANTS RON HENDRIXSON AND JC PENNY CORPORATION, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Court Proceedings is continued for evidentiary hearing to June 26, 2013 at 3:00 pm in Department 302. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
